name: academorix/integrations
purpose: Third-party integration credentials per Tenant — encrypted TenantIntegration config for Stripe, Slack, HubSpot, Zapier, custom OAuth2, SCIM, HRIS, and LMS providers.
capabilities: IntegrationConfig cast encrypted at rest via KMS pointer
7 lifecycle events: configured, sync, refresh, disable
when_to_use: Connecting a tenant workspace to a third-party SaaS with OAuth or API-key auth, secrets encrypted at rest.
when_not_to_use: For outbound webhook fan-out (Academorix → their URL), use the sibling academorix/webhook package.
